items.caption: A dmm fly ice axe with a black handle and pick, and an orange shaft. the axe is positioned against a white background, highlighting its features. the handle is black with a textured grip, and the pick is also black with a sharp, pointed edge. the shaft is orange with a textured pattern and the brand name "dmm" is visible. a product photo, likely intended for a catalog or online store, showcasing the item clearly and without any distractions.
